name: European Sour Cream Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
- For the crust, blend together butter, maple syrup, cream cheese, egg, orange rind, and vanilla. Add flour and baking powder. Roll out on a floured surface with a floured rolling pin until soft. Roll to 1/3-inch thickness. Fit or pat the dough into a 7-inch pie plate.
- Cut apples into 1/8-inch slices and arrange in a circular pattern on dough in pie plate.
- Refrigerate for 1/2 hour.
- Combine sour cream, maple syrup, and lemon juice. Spoon over chilled apples.
- Sprinkle nutmeg on top.
- Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes. Serves 6
